findings.evidence: grep: `CoerciveEnergy.lean:51:private lemma min_mul_prod_norm_sq_le_add`; `CoerciveEnergy.lean:108:have hmin := min_mul_prod_norm_sq_le_add hhalf.le hdef.le U`; no public equivalent found by grepping `min .*norm`, `Prod.norm_def`, and `IsCoercive.*prod`.
findings.fix: Make this a public named lemma, with a stable theorem name and docstring, or move it to the local product-norm/energy API so later coercivity proofs can reuse it directly.
findings.issue: `private lemma min_mul_prod_norm_sq_le_add` is a 19-line product sup-norm lower-bound bridge, then used to prove `IsCoercive` at line 108; keeping it private forces future jet/product coercivity proofs to duplicate the same case split on `Prod.norm_def`.

summary: One proof-quality issue: a substantial product-norm coercivity estimate is proved as a private helper, which hides a reusable fact needed by nearby and downstream coercivity proofs.
